name: Insurance Company Foreign Tax Credit

eligibility.description: Domestic insurance companies subject to tax under IRC Section 801 (life) or 831 (non-life) that have paid or accrued foreign income taxes.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Domestic insurance companies are allowed a credit for taxes paid to foreign countries or U.S. possessions, applying the principles of the Section 901 foreign tax credit to their specific taxable income definitions.
